text:
34% of MCP tools across 201 servers fail naming checks.

camelCase, PascalCase, ALL_CAPS.

the spec has a naming convention. nobody read it.

notion's official MCP server has 22 tools.

all 22 violate MCP naming conventions.

the organization that runs one of the most popular note-taking apps ships tools named like a 2015 java class.

models use tool names as semantic hints.

createNote vs create_note — same function, different signal.

bad names aren't just style issues. they affect how reliably a model selects the right tool.
